hero.body: We empower brands through creative strategies, high-impact visual content, and a digital presence that drives real results.

brandbook.body1_before: At The Monkeys we don't believe in marketing by inertia.
brandbook.body1_bold: Every brand deserves a clear direction
brandbook.body1_after: and a strategy that generates measurable impact. We integrate the entire value chain in a single team.
brandbook.body2_before: We work with business owners, personal brands, and growing companies who understand that
brandbook.body2_bold: marketing is not presence, it's construction
brandbook.body2_after: . We were born in the Dominican Republic to change how marketing is done here.

contact.title: Ready to grow?
contact.body: Your next step is simple: tell us about your brand. We take care of the rest, with strategy, structure, and execution that delivers real results from day one.
contact.placeholder_message: Tell us about your brand and what you need to achieve...
contact.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

methodology.subheadline: Each letter defines a pillar of our methodology. These are not fancy words, they are the real steps we use to build brands that grow.

m.title: Market Research
m.description: We analyze your market, competition, and audience before proposing any solution.

o.title: Optimization
o.description: Every process, channel, and asset is continuously optimized to maximize performance.

n.title: Narrative
n.description: We build your brand story with coherence, purpose, and real connection power.

k.title: KPI & Ads
k.description: We define clear indicators and run paid campaigns focused on measurable results.

e.title: Funnels
e.description: We design conversion funnels that guide users from first contact to purchase.

y.title: Yield
y.description: We maximize the return on every investment, ensuring resources generate the greatest impact.

s.title: Follow-Up
s.description: We monitor, report, and adjust in real time. Strategy does not end at launch.

services_section.subheadline: Each service is designed to connect with the rest. A brand doesn't grow in parts, it grows as an ecosystem.

strategy.title: Strategy & Positioning
strategy.description: We build your brand from a solid strategic foundation. We analyze the market, define positioning, and establish how to communicate with impact.

content.title: Strategic Content
content.description: Every piece responds to a strategy. We communicate with intention, aligning message, format, and brand objectives.

production.title: Audiovisual Production
production.description: Professional photo and video with aesthetic quality and strategic messaging. Every visual communicates what your brand needs to project.

ads.title: Digital Campaigns (Ads)
ads.description: Meta, Google, TikTok, and LinkedIn Ads optimized for measurable results. Every dollar invested has purpose and expected return.

seo.title: SEO & Digital Presence
seo.description: Organic positioning so the right people find you at the exact moment on Google and beyond.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Websites focused on conversion, user experience, and SEO positioning. Your website as a real growth tool.

influencers.title: Influencer Marketing
influencers.description: Strategic collaborations with content creators who bring real value, credibility, and relevant audiences.

process.left_line2: IT'S ABOUT BUILDING BRANDS WITH DIRECTION.
process.headline: OUR PROCESS HAS LOGIC.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.description: We understand your brand, market, and goals before proposing any solution. Without analysis there is no real direction.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: We define positioning, key messages, and the action plan. Every decision responds to a clear purpose.

execution.title: Execution
execution.description: We produce, publish, and launch campaigns with coherence and quality. One team, zero friction.

followup.title: Follow-Up
followup.description: We measure, learn, and adjust continuously. The best results are built by iterating with data.

meta.home_title: The Monkeys — Digital Agency in Santiago, DR
meta.home_description: Creative digital agency specializing in SEO, web development, content production, and digital campaigns. Santiago de los Caballeros, Dominican Republic.
